VulAI
DemoAbout
Try Demo

How VulAI Works

VulAI combines fast pattern matching with Claude AI to deliver context-aware security analysis that catches vulnerabilities static tools miss.

Architecture

Static Analyzer

Fast pattern matching detects SQL injection, hardcoded secrets, command injection, code injection, and more in milliseconds.

LLM Analyzer

Claude AI understands code logic and context, finding security issues that regex patterns can't detect.

Risk Scorer

Weighted vulnerability assessment produces A-F security grades based on actual impact and severity.

Technical Achievements

42/42 Tests Passing

100% test success rate with 27 backend tests and 15 extension tests.

Type-Safe Stack

Pydantic (Python) + TypeScript ensures zero runtime type errors.

Production Architecture

Async FastAPI, modular design, Docker-ready, Kubernetes provisions planned.

Claude AI Integration

Seamless anthropic SDK integration with fallback to static analysis.

Performance Optimized

Static analysis: 10-50ms. Claude analysis: 2-3 seconds. Total: <4 seconds.

Modular & Extensible

Each engine is independently testable and replaceable for future enhancements.

Detects 7+ Vulnerability Types

SQL Injection

Direct query concatenation, f-strings

Command Injection

os.system(), subprocess unsafe calls

Hardcoded Secrets

API keys, passwords, tokens

Code Injection

eval(), exec(), unsafe imports

Path Traversal

Unsafe file operations

Authentication Bypass

Weak validation, missing checks

API Endpoints

Technology Stack

Backend

  • • FastAPI (async, type-safe)
  • • Python 3.11+
  • • Pydantic 2.5+
  • • Anthropic Claude API
  • • Pytest (27 tests)
  • • Docker & Docker Compose

Frontend

  • • Next.js 14
  • • TypeScript 5.3+
  • • Tailwind CSS
  • • Lucide React Icons
  • • Axios HTTP client
  • • Jest Tests (15 tests)
